name: First American Title Insurance Company
description_short: First American Title provides title insurance and escrow settlement services for real estate transactions across Denver and the nation, with over 130 years of industry experience.
description_long:
First American Title is one of the largest and most respected title insurance companies in the United States, with a history spanning over 130 years of operation. The company has evolved significantly over time to meet modern real estate transaction needs, serving customers across the nation with their Denver downtown office located at 1899 Wynkoop Street, Suite 265. The organization maintains a strong commitment to excellence, having been recognized on the Fortune 100 Best Companies to Work For list for 10 consecutive years as of 2024.

First American Title's core services include comprehensive title insurance protection, professional escrow settlement services, and solutions designed to facilitate the efficient transfer of real estate. They offer homebuyer and seller resources, 1031 Exchange services, and new agent services to support various stakeholders in real estate transactions. The company provides innovative technology platforms including FirstAm IgniteRE, Eagle Homebook (customizable marketing materials for agents), and the First American Comprehensive Calculator. They also offer earnest money deposit services through ZOCCAM and provide remote online notarization (RON) options for more convenient closings.

The company distinguishes itself through a commitment to smart solutions, innovative technology, and high standards of customer care. First American Title invests heavily in customer-facing tools like the ALTOS Market Report platform for real estate professionals, multicultural resources, and comprehensive document centers. Their team includes experienced escrow officers, sales executives, and management personnel dedicated to personalized service. The organization has received recognition as #51 in Fortune 100 Best Companies to Work For 2024, #15 in Fortune Best Workplaces in Financial Services & Insurance 2023, and #90 in Fortune Best Workplaces for Women 2023.

As a title insurance and settlement services provider rather than a mortgage lender, First American Title functions as a service provider within real estate transactions rather than originating loans. Their Denver downtown office maintains standard business hours Monday-Friday 8am-5pm with availability for phone and email contact. While they provide essential transaction support services, consumers should note that title insurance and escrow services are typically required costs in real estate purchases rather than optional products, and rates may vary by transaction complexity and location.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Over 130 years of industry experience and evolution with real estate market changes
Ranked #51 on Fortune 100 Best Companies to Work For for 10 consecutive years (2024)
Offers remote online notarization (RON) for modern, convenient, and secure closing experiences
Provides comprehensive technology tools including FirstAm IgniteRE, Eagle Homebook, and ALTOS Market Reports for real estate professionals
Experienced team with dedicated escrow officers, sales executives, and branch management focused on transaction smoothness
Offers multicultural resources and comprehensive document centers to serve diverse customer needs
Available earnest money deposit services through ZOCCAM integration
cons: Title insurance and escrow services are required transaction costs, not optional products, limiting consumer choice
Limited to Denver downtown office location based on provided information; geographic availability may be restricted for some customers
Website does not provide transparent pricing or rate quotes; customers must contact for individual transaction estimates
No information provided about customer complaint history, resolution processes, or service level guarantees
RON (remote online notarization) availability limited to those who qualify; eligibility criteria not specified on website
best_for: Real estate agents and brokers seeking comprehensive closing support and marketing tools like Eagle Homebook
Home buyers and sellers in the Denver area conducting residential property transactions
Investors conducting 1031 Exchange transactions requiring specialized settlement expertise
Real estate professionals needing market insights and data analytics through ALTOS reports
diagnosis: First American Title is best for homebuyers, sellers, and real estate professionals in the Denver area needing professional title insurance and escrow settlement services to facilitate property transfers. The main caveat is that these are required transaction services with costs determined on a per-transaction basis; customers should expect to contact directly for pricing and should verify service availability for their specific transaction type and location.
services: Escrow settlement services and closing coordination
New agent onboarding and support services
Earnest money deposit handling via ZOCCAM
Eagle Homebook customizable marketing materials for agents
ALTOS Market Report access with localized real estate data
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
